use_cases: Building accessible form layouts with semantic field structure and spacing
Creating form inputs with integrated labels, descriptions, and error messages
Standardizing form field styling across SaaS and web applications
Constructing validation-aware form components with proper error display
Implementing form sections with consistent visual hierarchy and alignment
ai_summary: A comprehensive form field wrapper system built on Base UI's Field primitive, providing semantic structure with Label, Item, Description, Error, Control, and Validity sub-components. Features clean, minimalist styling using Tailwind CSS with muted color schemes for descriptions and destructive colors for errors. Designed for accessibility-first form architecture in any data-collection context.
